summary: Phase 41 Mobile App Wave 1 MVP testing complete. Backend: 17/17 tests passed (100%). Fixed 4 API endpoint mismatches in mobile app endpoints.ts. TypeScript compiles without errors. All required screen files present. Web frontend still functional.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: safetyScoreService.getRouteScore was using flat fields (origin_lat, origin_lng...), changed to nested objects {origin: {lat, lng}, destination: {lat, lng}}
FIXED: guardianDashboardService endpoints were using /guardian-dashboard/* but backend uses /guardian/dashboard/*
FIXED: safeRouteService.generateRoutes was using wrong endpoint /operator/safe-route with flat fields, changed to /safe-route with nested objects
FIXED: predictiveAlertService was using /operator/predictive-alert with flat fields, changed to /predictive-alert with nested {location: {lat, lng}} format
Mobile app TypeScript compiles without errors (npx tsc --noEmit passes)
Mobile app web export exists at /app/mobile/dist/ with all screen HTML files
All 8 required screen files present: login.tsx, register.tsx, profile-select.tsx, home.tsx, journey.tsx, safety-score.tsx, alerts.tsx, guardian.tsx
services/api.ts has auth interceptors with SecureStore (native) and localStorage (web)
services/endpoints.ts has all API service functions for auth, safety-score, guardian, guardian-dashboard, safe-route, predictive-alert, night-guardian, push
stores/authStore.ts has all required methods: login, logout, register, loadToken, setProfileMode
theme/index.ts has colors, spacing, fontSize, radius, shadows, scoreColor, scoreLabel, riskColor utilities
Web frontend still accessible and functional at https://Nagarik-showcase.preview.emergentagent.com

success_rate.mobile_app: 100% (all files present, TypeScript compiles, web export exists)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 41 React Native Mobile App Wave 1 MVP complete. Mobile app at /app/mobile/ with web export at /app/mobile/dist/. Fixed 4 API endpoint mismatches in endpoints.ts (route score format, guardian dashboard path, safe route format, predictive alert format). The app supports 3 profile modes: Women Safety, Kids Safety, Parents Care. All backend APIs working: POST /api/auth/login, GET /api/safety-score/location, POST /api/safety-score/route, GET /api/safety-score/journey/{id}, POST /api/guardian/start, GET /api/guardian/sessions/active, GET /api/guardian/dashboard/loved-ones, GET /api/guardian/dashboard/alerts, GET /api/guardian/dashboard/sessions, POST /api/predictive-alert/with-alternative, POST /api/safe-route

required_services.api.ts: EXISTS - API client with auth interceptors
required_services.endpoints.ts: EXISTS - All API service functions (FIXED 4 endpoint mismatches)

required_stores.authStore.ts: EXISTS - login, logout, register, loadToken, setProfileMode

required_theme.index.ts: EXISTS - colors, spacing, scoreColor, scoreLabel utilities
